title: grewia rugosifolia
intro: Grewia rugosifolia is a plant species commonly known as the 'Rough-leaved Silk Fleece Tree', belonging to the family Malvaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating various health issues such as fever, diarrhea, and inflammation. Its leaves, bark, and roots are rich in flavonoids, saponins, and tannins, which provide health benefits such as antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. Grewia rugosifolia can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
